extracted_json.title: Create a plan for solving each sub-problem (SP)

blocks.text: Create a plan for solving each sub-problem (SP)

extracted_json.summary_topic_line: Planning approaches for solving each sub-problem (SP1–SP3) in a design process.
extracted_json.summary_gist: The page outlines a plan for tackling three design sub-problems. SP1 (Establish needs) is addressed by understanding how cell-phones work, internet research, and compiling a list of customer needs (functions, features). SP2 (Assess how well) uses own experience, internet consumer research, and customer surveys. SP3 (Improve) relies on internet research and creative brainstorming.

transcription:
